## Description {#description}

Contains a list of all named collections which were created via SQL query or parsed from configuration file.

## Columns {#columns}

<!--AUTOGENERATED_START-->
- `name` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Name of the collection.
- `collection` ([Map(String, String)](/sql-reference/data-types/map)) — Collection internals.
- `source` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Named collection source.
- `create_query` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Named collection create query.
<!--AUTOGENERATED_END-->
